name: Spanish off-topic redirect
expected_behavior: Declines the off-topic question politely in Spanish. Redirects to available property topics (dining, entertainment, hotel, spa, gaming) in Spanish. Does not answer the off-topic question.
expected_behavioral_quality: Politely redirects off-topic Spanish question back to property topics. Redirect is in Spanish, lists available categories, and does not make the guest feel judged for asking.

turns.user_message: Cual es la capital de Francia?
turns.agent_response: Eso está fuera de lo que puedo ayudarte, pero con gusto te asisto con cualquier cosa sobre Mohegan Sun — restaurantes, entretenimiento, hotel, spa, o juegos. ¿En qué puedo ayudarte?
